value.description:
A late-model Corvega supercar tuned for absurd road speed and almost nothing else. It devours gasoline, hates rough ground, and exists mainly to outrun whatever is behind you.
As with most wasteland prestige cars, the speed comes at the cost of fuel economy, durability, and cargo room.
<color=#bb8f04>Crew:</color> Driver x1, Passenger x1 <color=#bb8f04>Fuel type:</color> Gasoline

A late-model Corvega supercar tuned for absurd road speed and almost nothing else. It devours gasoline, hates rough ground, and exists mainly to outrun whatever is behind you.
As with most wasteland prestige cars, the speed comes at the cost of fuel economy, durability, and cargo room.
<color=#bb8f04>Crew:</color> Driver x1, Passenger x1 <color=#bb8f04>Fuel type:</color> Gasoline
